channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Two drains are completely blocked just uphill from the last houses . One is almost buried!, 2nd June
item.description:
Two drains on the lane are totally blocked. I’ve previously been told by Jake in the Highways department that they are unblocked annually. That is definitely not the case. These have not been dealt with for years. You’ll see the resulting surface water in the photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Caller reports, raised kerb is damged has been damaged. The slab/conreate is loose
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Building spoil/soil being removed off site by heavy truck leaving some material on the highway. Not acceptable. Please investigate, 2nd June
item.description:
Soil on highway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post) problem, 2nd June
item.description:
PERM REPAIR 43120531 - Could you raise a perm repair for the above job at WARDS ROAD Cheltenham GL51 6JN for a bollard that has been hit ,could you assign to AHR please. USRN 6700615 ( E ) 391924 ( N ) 221032
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Growth on tree at street level obscures view onto highway and pavement when exiting and entering property. It presents a hazard for road users and pedestrians., 2nd June
item.description:
The tree is on the verge directly outside no. 18 Albert Road. The view has reduced as the growth has increased and it is is likely to get worse as growth continues.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83, Malden Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
